itinerary.title: Arrival in Goa and Mandovi River Sunset Cruise
itinerary.description: Arrive in Goa, meet our representative, and transfer to your hotel. In the evening, enjoy a scenic boat cruise on the Mandovi River with traditional Goan music and dances.

itinerary.title: North Goa Beaches & Anjuna Nightlife
itinerary.description: Visit the popular beaches of Baga, Calangute, and Vagator. Participate in optional water sports at Calangute and experience the famous nightlife at Anjuna Beach.

itinerary.title: Old Goa Heritage & Portuguese Churches
itinerary.description: Explore the UNESCO World Heritage monuments of Old Goa, including the Basilica of Bom Jesus and Se Cathedral, showcasing magnificent Portuguese architecture.

itinerary.title: South Goa Palolem Beach & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive to the beautiful, crescent-shaped Palolem Beach in South Goa for a relaxing morning. Later, transfer to the airport or railway station for your return journey.

title: Goa: Beach & Heritage Getaway
description: Experience the perfect harmony of vibrant coastal energy and historical grandeur in India's ultimate beach destination. Relax under the sun on the golden sands of Baga and Calangute, explore the majestic Portuguese architecture and historic cathedrals of Old Goa, and dive into thrilling water sports at Anjuna Beach. Conclude your day with a scenic cruise along the Mandovi River as you savor Goa's unique fusion of Indian and European cultures.
highlights: Unwind on the bustling golden sands of Baga and Calangute beaches
Explore UNESCO-listed Portuguese-era churches and heritage sites in Old Goa
Thrilling water sports and legendary seaside nightlife at Anjuna Beach
Scenic sunset boat cruise with traditional music along the Mandovi River
Relax in the peaceful and pristine atmosphere of Palolem Beach in South Goa
Indulge in authentic Indo-Portuguese culinary tours and local street food
